mermaidSyntax:
flowchart TD A[IND Application
Submitted to FDA] --> B{FDA Safety
Review} B -->|30-day hold expires| C[Phase I Trial
Safety & Dosing] B -->|Safety concerns| HOLD[Clinical Hold] HOLD --> A C --> D{Phase I
Review} D -->|Safety data acceptable| E[Phase II Trial
Efficacy & Side Effects] D -->|Unacceptable toxicity| W[Withdrawn] E --> F{Phase II
Review} F -->|Efficacy demonstrated| G[Phase III Trial
Large-Scale Confirmation] F -->|Insufficient efficacy| W G --> H{Phase III
Review} H -->|Statistical significance met| I[NDA Submission] H -->|Failed endpoints| W I --> J{FDA Review
Panel Decision} J -->|Approved| K[Drug Approved
Post-Market Surveillance] J -->|Complete Response| L[Rejected
Requires Additional Data] L --> G
